description: Style NoteThis shoe is ideal for those who don't want to compromise when it comes to the stylish look of their footwear - and the best part is that skechers have also paid attention to practicality. The soft footbed takes the natural curve of your feet, the lace-up upper of the shoes will keep your foot firm on the ground and the thick outsole will accelerate your speed when on the go!Product DetailsCharcoal grey leather shoe with central lace-ups, overlays, reinforced overlay and branding on the lateral side of the shoePadded tongue and innerThick rubber outsoleDurable rubber outsole with patterned groovesMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
